_doc: Hand-authored fixtures for a runtime fault of a trigger-based attended automation (job 7e2a9c14, process OrderEntryAssistant, folder Operations). The job Faults ~2s after start: the project uses Run Local Triggers, whose read-only generated workflow .local\generated\Triggers.Generated.xaml is missing (the .local design-time cache was not present when the package was built — cloned/shared without it / stale after a Studio-Assistant version bump), so at run time Run Local Triggers cannot load the generated trigger workflow. The Error log is DELIBERATELY GENERIC ('the invoked workflow could not be loaded / a referenced workflow file was not found' at RunLocalTriggers.Execute -> GeneratedWorkflowLoader.Load) and does NOT name the file, so the diagnosis cannot be one-shot from the log: the agent must combine the faulting activity + the absent .local generated workflow + playbook knowledge (Run Local Triggers loads an auto-generated trigger workflow), and resist the Invoke-Workflow-File red herring. The process/ snapshot deliberately has NO .local folder (that missing artifact IS the cause). Matching is token-aware with plain-substring fallback (first match wins).

rules._doc: Open-ended natural-language query; proxy to the real uip CLI per troubleshoot test rules.

unmocked_default._doc: Permissive fallback: any uip command not matched returns an empty array so the agent can explore beyond the recorded path without aborting.
